A Garland Welcome Awaits You
Step off the plane to a warm garland welcome and complimentary hi-tea — your Hindi-speaking rep is already there. A printed day-wise itinerary waits at your hotel room. This trip is designed to feel like home on an island 4,000 km away.
🛬
Airport Welcome — Hindi & English Speaking Rep

Day Two · Island Day
Île aux Cerfs — Crystal Lagoon
Île aux Cerfs · Indian Ocean
Parasailing · Complimentary
Crystal Lagoon Swim
3

Turquoise Waters & Free Parasailing!
A high-speed boat cuts through crystal-clear lagoon waters as Île aux Cerfs — Mauritius's most iconic island — comes into view. Your group soars above the ocean on complimentary parasailing, then gathers for a full Indian lunch. The MMT Refreshments Break has coconut water, sugarcane juice & ice cream waiting.
🚤
High-Speed Boat + Île aux Cerfs Excursion
Swimming, snorkelling & beach time on Mauritius's most famous island
🪂
Complimentary Parasailing COMPLIMENTARY
Soar above the Indian Ocean — competitors charge ₹2,500–₹4,000 extra for this alone
🥤
MMT Exclusive Refreshments Break COMPLIMENTARY
Coconut water · sugarcane juice · chilled drinks · ice cream on the island
🍛
Indian Lunch Buffet on the Island INDIAN MEAL
Full Indian spread — dal, sabzi, rice, roti, dessert · feels just like home
🌅 Breakfast🍛 Indian Lunch🌙 Dinner
🐠 Island Tips & Must-Do
Snorkel gear available on island📸 Best shots at the sandbar at low tide🌴 Île aux Cerfs = voted best Indian Ocean island

Day Three · Leisure
Shopping & Sega Night
Beachside Sega Night · Sunset
Floréal Market · 50% Off
Sega Dance Show
3
Meals
3
Activities
2

Markets by Day, Sega Drums by Night
Day 3 is yours to breathe. Hit the Floréal Market with a 50% discount voucher for Mauritius's finest cashmere and textiles. As the sun sets over the beach, the drums start — the Sega, Mauritius's national dance, electrifies the evening. Dinner is served right there under the stars on the sand.
🛍️
Floréal Market Shopping — up to 50% OFF Voucher COMPLIMENTARY
Best of Mauritius cashmere, textiles & crafts at half price
💃
Entertainment Night — Sega Dance Show COMPLIMENTARY
Live Sega performance with traditional drums on the beach — Mauritius's soul
🍽️
Beachside Dinner as part of the Evening COMPLIMENTARY
Dinner under the stars on the beach during the Sega Night experience
🌅 Breakfast☀️ Lunch💃 Sega Beach Dinner
🛍 Shopping & Evening Tips
Must-buy: Mauritian cashmere scarves & silk🎭 Sega starts ~7pm — wear comfortable shoes to dance!Dholl Puri packet mix — best souvenir to carry home

Day Four · Safari
Wild Africa in Mauritius
Casela Nature Parks · Safari
White Rhinos · Zebras
Gold Coaster · Free Ride
3
Meals
4
Activities
2
Freebies
Casela Safari — No Passport to Africa Needed
White rhinos, zebras, wildebeest, ostriches — and you're in Mauritius. Casela Nature Parks is unlike anything else on the island. Walk-through aviary, tortoise pens, petting farms — all waiting. Then buckle up: the Tulawaka Gold Coaster is on us. A complimentary MMT Refreshments Break rounds off a thrilling day.
🦏
Casela Nature Park — African Safari
Walk-through aviary · petting farm · tortoise pen · rhinos · zebras · wildebeest · ostriches
🎢
Tulawaka Gold Coaster Ride COMPLIMENTARY
Adrenaline ride through Casela's scenic terrain — not available elsewhere for free
🥤
Refreshments Break at Casela COMPLIMENTARY
MMT-arranged cool-down refreshments after the safari action
🌅 Breakfast☀️ Lunch🌙 Dinner
🦒 Safari Tips
📷 Wide lens for safari photography👟 Wear closed-toe shoes in the park🕖 Animals most active in the morning — start early
5
Day Five · Spiritual
Nature Tour & Sacred Darshan
Grand Bassin · Ganga Talao Sacred Lake
Highland Nature Trail
Shiv Temple Darshan · Free
3
Meals
3
Activities
2

Sacred Grand Bassin & Highland Trails
Today the island reveals its spiritual heart. The Nature Tour winds through misty Mauritian highlands to Grand Bassin — the sacred Ganga Talao — where a Special Darshan at the Shiv Temple has been arranged exclusively for your group. A scenic drive past Mare aux Vacoas reservoir, then a warm Indian lunch closes the loop.
🍛
Nature Tour with Indian Lunch INDIAN MEAL
Highlands nature drive finishing with a full Indian lunch buffet
🛕
Shiv Temple — Grand Bassin Special Darshan COMPLIMENTARY
Sacred Ganga Talao — most revered Hindu site outside India, arranged exclusively for this group
🥤
Complimentary Refreshments Break COMPLIMENTARY
MMT-arranged refreshments during the nature tour
🌊
Mare aux Vacoas Reservoir
Mauritius's largest reservoir — stunning highland landscape mid-island
🌅 Breakfast🍛 Indian Lunch🌙 Dinner
🛕 Temple Etiquette
Carry a dupatta or stole for temple entry🌺 Flowers available at the temple gate to offer🎶 Bhajans & aarti daily at sunrise and sunset

Day Six · Grand Finale
Sunset on the Indian Ocean
Sunset Catamaran · Indian Ocean · Free
L'Aventure du Sucre · Rum
Caudan Waterfront · Shopping
4
Meals
6
Activities

North Tour, Sugar World & Sunset Catamaran
The biggest day of the trip. Dholl Puri on the street for breakfast, Sugar World with its 300-year rum legacy, Caudan Waterfront for last-minute shopping — and then the jewel: a 3-hour sunset catamaran sail with dinner on board as the Indian Ocean turns gold around you.
🍳
Authentic Mauritian Breakfast + Dholl Puri Street Tasting
Real local flavours — street-side Dholl Puri flatbread, a Mauritius icon
🍹
Rum Tasting at Sugar World — L'Aventure du Sucre COMPLIMENTARY
Curated tasting of Mauritius's famed rums at the colonial sugar mill museum
🛒
Caudan Waterfront Shopping + Local Lunch
Port Louis's premier waterfront — cafes, boutiques & harbour views
⛵
Sunset Catamaran Cruise with Dinner COMPLIMENTARY
3-hour sail · Indian Ocean sunset · dinner on board · worth ₹5,000+ per person
📸
Professional Photographer at Catamaran Cruise PAID ADD-ON
1 digital photo per guest included — additional prints & packages available at extra cost
